subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and from its contents it became evident that the desire of thy heart and soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید از مضمون چنان معلوم گردید که آرزوی دل و جان
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
